title: Canadian passports and other travel documents: Check our service standards - Canada.ca
content:
## Check our service standards : Canadian passports and other travel documents
Check the service standards below to see approximately how long it may take us to process your application under normal circumstances. We recommend you don’t finalize any travel plans until you get your passport.
The service standard for your application is our commitment to process your application in a certain amount of time, under normal circumstances.
The processing time for your application is the actual time it takes us to process your application. We can’t tell you exactly how long it will take.
- Your processing time starts once we have your application form all your supporting documents, and payment of your fees depends on whether your application is properly completed or not depends on how you applied depends on if we need new or additional information for your application doesn’t include mailing time
- starts once we have your application form all your supporting documents, and payment of your fees
- your application form
- all your supporting documents, and
- payment of your fees
- depends on whether your application is properly completed or not
- depends on how you applied
- depends on if we need new or additional information for your application
- doesn’t include mailing time
- A small number of cases may take longer if we have to ask for corrections (to your application) or new photos when we do routine verifications and security checks
- if we have to ask for corrections (to your application) or new photos
- when we do routine verifications and security checks

## Service standards for regular passport applications submitted in Canada
Submitted in person at a passport office (Service Canada Centre – Passport Services) or Service Canada Centre that offers 10-day processing
Submitted in person at a regular Service Canada Centre, a Service Canada Scheduled Outreach Site that offers passport services, by mail or online

### Check your application status
Answer a few questions to find out how to check your application status.
Learn how to check the status of your application
If we don’t meet our service standards
You may be eligible for a refund of your fees under the Service Fees Act . Refunds are processed automatically. Learn what refunds you might be eligible for .
Learn more about our policies for fee remissions:
- Departmental Remission Policy
- Passport Subordinate Remission Policy

## Service standards for urgent or express passport applications submitted in Canada
By end of next business day
We aren’t liable for any losses as a result of the passport not being issued to you or your child in time.
A passport officer will tell you the date of your pick-up when you apply.
Learn more about urgent or express passport services .

## Service standards for regular passport applications submitted from the US
Applications mailed from the US

### Check your application status

Learn how to check the status of your application

You may be eligible for a refund of your fees under the Service Fees Act . Refunds are processed automatically. Learn what refunds you might be eligible for .

### Check your application status

Learn how to check the status of your application
If we don’t meet our service standards
You may be eligible for a refund of your fees under the Service Fees Act . Refunds are processed automatically. Learn what refunds you might be eligible for .

## Service standards for other travel document applications
We aim to process applications within our service standard.
If you have already applied and now need a travel document urgently, contact us . We aim to respond to urgent requests sent through our web form within 3 business days.
We recommend you don’t finalize any travel plans until you get your travel document.
Refugee travel documents and certificates of identity
Fill out our web form .
Tell us it’s about a Certificate of Identity/Refugee Travel Document .
Include your travel date and the reason you need the travel document.
If we don’t meet our service standards
You may be eligible for a refund of your fees under the Service Fees Act . Refunds are processed automatically. Learn what refunds you might be eligible for .
Learn more about our policies for fee remissions:
- Departmental Remission Policy
- Passport Subordinate Remission Policy

## Service standards for official travel applications
Learn what our service standards are for official travel.

## Certified true copies of passports or other travel documents

## Service standards for certified true copies of a passport
Certified true copy without a stamp
Certified true copy with a stamp (wet seal)

## Service standard for certified true copies of a refugee travel document or certificate of identity
Certified true copy with or without a stamp (wet seal)
